lingala.function_grapher_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Esaleli ya kosala graphique ya fonction. Bankuse ya clavier: 1 tii 6 eponaka lolenge ya fonction, D dérivée, A surface, T tableau, L koyekola.
lingala.where_the_function_crosses_the_x_axis_: Esika fonction ekatisi axe x. Na ba-point oyo, f(x) = 0. Koluka ba-racines ezali na ntina na algèbre mpe calcul.
lingala.where_the_function_crosses_the_y_axis_: Esika fonction ekatisi axe y. Oyo ezali motuya ya f(0) — tia kaka x = 0.
lingala.the_slope_tells_you_how_steep_the_func: Pente eyebisaka yo ndenge fonction ezali makasi na point nyonso. Ligne tangente esimbaka courbe na point kaka moko. Salá trace slider mpo na kolukaluka!
lingala.the_derivative_measures_the_rate_of_ch: Dérivée emekaka bango ya mbongwana. Fungola yango mpo na kotala ndenge pente ebongwanaka na fonction. Esika f′(x) = 0, fonction ezali na motuya monene to moke ya esika.
lingala.the_shaded_area_represents_the_integra: Esika ya elilingi emonisaka intégrale — «boyanganisi» ya mobimba ya f(x). Na bomoi ya solo, oyo ekoki kolimbola molai etamboli, énergie esalelami, to probabilité.
lingala.when_a_0_the_parabola_opens_up_when_a_: Soki a > 0, parabole efungwamaka likolo (⏣). Soki a < 0, efungwamaka na nse (⏢). Sommet ezali point ya kobaluka. Meká kobongola 'a' mpo na kotala!
lingala.amplitude_a_controls_the_height_freque: Amplitude (a) etambwisaka bosanda, fréquence (b) etambwisaka motango ya ba-cycles, mpe déphasage (c) etambwisaka vague na lobɔkɔ ya mwasi/mobali. Période = 2π/b.
lingala.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: na kosalela maloba ya mokolo na mokolo ya pɛtɛɛ mpe ba-phrases ya mokuse, kozanga maloba ya technique
lingala.for_a_high_school_algebra_or_pre_calc_: mpo na moyekoli ya eteyelo ya likolo na algèbre to pré-calcul, na maloba lokola pente, esika ekokutana, sommet, période, mpe amplitude
lingala.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Finá «Limbolá» mpo tutor AI alimbola fonction oyo na niveau ya kotánga oyo oponi.
lingala.function_zoo_six_common_function_shape: Zoo ya ba-fonctions — bilongi motoba ya ba-fonctions ya momeseno
lingala.sliders_for_amplitude_frequency_phase_: Ba-sliders mpo na amplitude, fréquence, phase. Kokabola discrète ya ba-états 5. Ba-point te, komonisa te.
lingala.hypothesis_how_does_phase_shift_affect: Hypothèse: Ndenge nini déphasage ezali na bopusi na vague oyo emonanaka?
lingala.find_two_settings_that_produce_visuall: Luká ba-réglages mibale oyo esalaka ba-vagues ya ndenge moko na miso.
lingala.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Nasosoli — limbolá na maloba na yo moko
lingala.explain_how_each_parameter_shapes_a_si: Limbolá ndenge paramètre moko na moko esalaka lolenge ya vague sinus.
lingala.design_note_discrete_5_state_marker_no: Note ya conception: elembo discrète ya ba-états 5; ba-point ya vague te; komonisa te — na conception.
